update.releaseNotes:
v5.2.1 - Changelog
> Most likely the last update before Trackblazer begins. Give like a week or two for app support.
New --- - Add a action counter to the `Remote Log Viewer` to keep track of how many times training occurred, racing, energy recovery, etc. - The app will now perform a final aptitude and stat update at the end of the career. - Add `Trackblazer` as a disabled option to the Start button selector on the `Home` page. No code in place to support `Trackblazer` so it will stay disabled for the time being.
Adjustments --- - Adjust alignment of the `Remote Log Viewer` dashboard on mobile. - Remove the scenario selector option from the `Settings` page as it is now redundant with the button on the `Home` page. - Implement server-side log parsing and broadcast JSON objects to the `Remote Log Viewer`. - Remove message batching when broadcasting to the `Remote Log Viewer`. - When a new run begins, the dashboard will now be cleared properly for the `Remote Log Viewer`. - Remove the manual stat cap option from the `Training Settings` page in favor of hardcoded caps defined per scenario.
Fixed --- - Fix the stat value not being able to correct itself if it was misread. - Fix bug with date and action parsing for the `Remote Log Viewer`.
